productDisplayName: Maxima Men Ssteele White Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analog watch with rectangular stainless steel case Dial style: White dial with orange hands Strap style: Black genuine leather strap, has a tang clasp with a fixed loop for a custom fit Features: Branding at the 12 and 6 hour mark, date aperture at the 12 hour mark and screw to reset time Water resistant 30 M Comes in a signature SSTEELE caseWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
